title: ExperimentFlag

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

name.description: Programmatic name of the flag (used in code and config).

state.description: Current rollout stage of the flag.

owner.description: Optional URN of the subject responsible for this flag.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of what this flag controls.

killSwitch.description: When true, this flag can be disabled globally in an emergency with no further review.

description: A named feature flag controlling the rollout lifecycle of experimental or beta functionality, tracking progression from shadow testing through full enablement to retirement.
